home.headline: Movio
home.copy: Publish a private transfer. Receive offers. Choose the one that fits — calmly, clearly, on your terms.
home.stepsLead: No opaque flat fares. A marketplace where you define the trip and choose the offer.
home.step1Body: Pickup, drop-off, time, and the details that matter.
home.step2Body: Verified drivers reply with price and conditions.
home.step3Body: Compare, accept, and travel with clarity.

auth.loginHint: Demo: cliente@movio.app / motorista@movio.app / admin@movio.app — password movio123
auth.registerLead: Request trips or send offers — one account, one role to start.
auth.name: Name

how.title: How Movio works
how.lead: A private-driver marketplace reduced to the essentials: request, propose, choose.

forDrivers.title: Drive with intention
forDrivers.lead: See open requests, set your price, and grow with verified trust.
